metadata.title: Mousewheel Image zoom
metadata.description: This plugin enables you to increase/decrease the size of an image by scrolling

regex.source: .setDesc('Key that needs to be pressed down for mousewheel zoom to work.')
regex.target: .setDesc('鼠标滚轮缩放时需要按下的键。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Step value by which the size of the image should be increased/decreased')
regex.target: .setDesc('图像尺寸增大/减小的步长值')

regex.source: .setDesc('Initial image size if no size was defined beforehand')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果事先未定义图像尺寸，则为初始图像尺寸')
